enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Invalid scheduled state. The initial state for every package, before it is interpreted by Dynamo

enum_values.name: ScheduledForDeletion
enum_values.summary: The package is scheduled to be deleted. After the next Dynamo restart, the package will deleted from the package locations

enum_values.name: ScheduledForUnload
enum_values.summary: The package is scheduled to be unloaded. After the next Dynamo restart, the package will be in an Unloaded state
